ast.source: Failed to cache images. Displaying original images...

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Confirm only if an external destination is enabled
ast.target: 仅在启用外部目标时确认

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: — leave both fields as plain text. The prefix goes before the per-file prompt and the suffix goes after. Final =
ast.target: — 将两个字段保留为纯文本。前缀放在每个文件提示之前，后缀放在之后。最终 =

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: — 在前缀中包含字面量标记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: somewhere in the prefix. The per-file prompt is substituted at that exact position and the suffix is ignored. Good when the per-file prompt needs to land mid-sentence (e.g. prefix = "Editorial illustration in our house style: {prompt}, on a soft pastel background").
ast.target: 。每个文件的提示将在该确切位置替换，后缀将被忽略。当每个文件的提示需要放在句子中间时很有用（例如，前缀 = \"Editorial illustration in our house style: {prompt}, on a soft pastel background\"）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Describe ONLY what is in the scene — characters, setting, action. Don't describe style or brand colors here; that's handled by Settings → Brand Template (prefix = Style Notes, suffix = Brand Alignment). The Resolved Prompt Preview below shows the final assembled prompt.
ast.target: 仅描述场景中的内容——人物、环境、动作。不要在此描述风格或品牌颜色；这些由设置 → 品牌模板处理（前缀 = 风格说明，后缀 = 品牌对齐）。下面的“已解析提示预览”显示了最终组装的提示。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: No brand template configured — your prompt is sent to Ideogram exactly as typed. Set a prefix/suffix in plugin settings to wrap it automatically.
ast.target: 未配置品牌模板——您的提示将按原样发送给 Ideogram。在插件设置中设置前缀/后缀以自动包装它。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Slot-insertion mode: your prompt is substituted into the prefix at the {prompt} token; suffix is ignored.
ast.target: 插槽插入模式：您的提示在 {prompt} 标记处替换到前缀中；后缀被忽略。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Bookend mode: prefix prepended, suffix appended (separated by spaces).
ast.target: 书挡模式：前缀前置，后缀附加（用空格分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path where generated images will be saved. Use absolute path (e.g., /users/username/path) or relative to vault root

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 搜索结果中默认获取的图片数量（1-50）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate images via Ideogram v3 with brand-template prompt wrapping
ast.target: 通过 Ideogram v3 生成图片，使用品牌模板提示词包装

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Ideogram API key (sent as the API-Key header)
ast.target: 您的 Ideogram API 密钥（作为 API-Key 头发送）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cost/quality tradeoff. Quality costs the most.
ast.target: 成本/质量权衡。质量最高成本最高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Coarse style category. Per-file image_style_type frontmatter overrides this.
ast.target: 粗略的样式类别。每个文件的 image_style_type frontmatter 会覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether Ideogram is allowed to rewrite your prompt. Off preserves brand voice exactly.
ast.target: 是否允许 Ideogram 重写您的提示词。关闭可完全保留品牌语调。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run the layerize text endpoint to strip incidental text. Modal can override per-call.
ast.target: 运行分层文本端点以去除附带文本。模态框可覆盖每次调用的设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cache external images locally to bypass csp restrictions and enable offline viewing
ast.target: 在本地缓存外部图片以绕过 CSP 限制并支持离线查看

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path where cached images will be stored (relative to vault root)

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 图片缓存的最大大小（兆字节）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically clean up old cached images
ast.target: 自动清理旧的缓存图片

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 移除超过此天数的缓存图片

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove all cached images to free up space
ast.target: 移除所有缓存图片以释放空间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Intercept image drops and pastes; show the confirmation modal.
ast.target: 拦截图片拖放和粘贴；显示确认模态框。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lets the user skip the modal for the current note. Never persists across Obsidian restarts.
ast.target: 允许用户跳过当前笔记的模态框。此设置不会在 Obsidian 重启后保留。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anonymous upload via a client ID. Public — use for non-sensitive imagery only.
ast.target: 通过客户端 ID 进行匿名上传。公开——仅适用于非敏感图像。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Image Gin Drop Gate: the "Imgur" community plugin is also enabled. Both plugins handle image drops, so you will see two modals. Disable the Imgur community plugin in Settings \u2192 Community Plugins, then enable Image Gin's Imgur destination if you want Imgur uploads from inside the gate.
ast.target: Image Gin 拖放门控：“Imgur”社区插件也已启用。两个插件都会处理图像拖放，因此您会看到两个模态框。请在设置 → 社区插件中禁用 Imgur 社区插件，然后启用 Image Gin 的 Imgur 目标位置，以便通过门控进行 Imgur 上传。

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: E.g. A series of robots representing AI agents wearing construction work vests with "agent" on the back, reviewing checklists at an industrial production line where code snippets and function names roll off instead of physical products
ast.target: 例如：一系列代表 AI 代理的机器人，穿着建筑工作背心，背面印有“代理”字样，在工业生产线上检查清单，代码片段和函数名从生产线上滚落，而不是实物产品

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: E.g. No text, no watermarks, no signatures (already merged from settings + frontmatter; edit to add more for this run)
ast.target: 例如：无文字、无水印、无签名（已从设置和前置信息中合并；编辑以添加更多本次运行的指令）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure style presets for image generation
ast.target: 为图像生成配置样式预设

ast.name: text
ast.source: Prepends/appends fixed text to every per-file prompt so all generated images share a consistent style. The per-file prompt itself is the file's image_prompt frontmatter (or whatever you type in the modal). There are two assembly patterns:
ast.target: 在每个文件的提示词前/后添加固定文本，使所有生成的图像共享一致的样式。每个文件的提示词本身是文件的 image_prompt 前置信息（或您在模态框中输入的任何内容）。有两种组装模式：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 前缀 + 每个文件的提示词 + 后缀

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the modal's resolved prompt preview to see exactly what gets sent to Ideogram before generating.
ast.target: 使用模态框中解析后的提示词预览，以确切查看在生成前发送给 Ideogram 的内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled, every image dropped or pasted into a note opens a confirmation modal asking where it should go: vault attachments, ImageKit, or Imgur. Built for writers who handle private client imagery and want every image destination to be a deliberate decision.
ast.target: 启用后，每个拖放或粘贴到笔记中的图像都会打开一个确认模态框，询问其应存放的位置：保险库附件、ImageKit 或 Imgur。专为处理私人客户图像并希望每个图像的目标位置都是经过深思熟虑决定的写作者设计。
